open_known_gaps.summary: Client-side memory-exhaustion (PDF-bomb DoS) class. (a) viewer.js renderAll() loops 1..numPages with no page-count cap or processing timeout; thumbnails.js also loops 1..total. (b) AMPLIFIED by TASK-316 (SYSTEM CRITICAL): renderAll()'s supersede guard is not re-checked after `await getPage()` before appending DOM, so rapid zoom/fit-width accumulates duplicate page wrappers+canvases without bound (4 rapid zooms -> 4x canvases for a 1-page PDF). A high-page-count PDF within the 50MB limit plus a few fast zoom clicks multiplies canvas backing-store memory on the 1.6 GiB box. Client-side only, no server impact. Fix = developer task: shared page-count cap at the viewer.js load boundary + the TASK-316 token re-check. Documented in docs/security-guide.md.

notes: Clean review, no new vulnerabilities, no CRITICAL issues. New code this tick (developer 20:xx): split.js (page-range extract via pdf-lib, client-side; download filename strips unsafe chars + caps length, range validated 1..numPages, objectURL revoked), annotate.js (text-highlight; content via createElement/textContent, innerHTML only as layer clear, overlay styles built from NUMERIC selection-rect fractions not user strings, default color is a constant), viewer.js (now renders pdf.js text layer per page; container.innerHTML only as clear), app.js wiring (no user content). DOM sink sweep across all js/: every innerHTML is a container clear (= ''), zero eval/Function/document.write, zero fetch/XHR/.src, zero inline on* handlers. upload.js validation boundary unchanged. Live headers confirm full CSP + 4 security headers; .mjs MIME text/javascript + nosniff; sensitive paths (.git 403, traversal 404, .sh/.md/.bak 403) all blocked; nginx -t valid; 0 failed SSH auths in 24h; no secrets in web JS. Stability gate CLOSED (1 SYSTEM CRITICAL: TASK-316 renderAll race) -> no new-feature recommendations; that race is also the SEC-002 amplifier above and is the priority fix. Only open security item is SEC-002 (low, client-side memory-exhaustion) -> tracked for developer in docs/security-guide.md + TASK-316, not security's to implement.
